name: flex-table-vue
description: A flexible, feature-rich Vue 3 data table component with sorting, virtual scrolling, and interactive column management. Ships a pre-built CSS bundle (flex-table-vue/style.css): Tailwind v4 utilities compiled in-repo, then @layer blocks flattened for compatibility with host apps that run Tailwind v3 PostCSS on node_modules. Supports client-side and server-side sorting, drag-and-drop column reordering (SortableJS), per-column visibility and width controls, localStorage persistence, and customizable text labels. Fully typed with TypeScript.

scripts.build: vite build && node scripts/unwrap-css-layers.mjs && vue-tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist --declaration --declarationDir dist
